protocol: equal geometry; MDAnalysis H5MD full traj (positions each frame) vs h5py load of position/value only vs readcon CON full frames vs readcon.read_chemfiles multi-frame XYZ
host_note: run records wall times; fill host/date in commit message

apples_notes.mda_h5md: Universe + iterate all frames + .positions (MDA Python API)
apples_notes.h5py_positions: raw HDF5 dataset load only — not symbols/cell/constraints/atom_id/JSON
apples_notes.readcon_con: full ConFrame parse (payload richer than coords array)

deps: uv pip install MDAnalysis h5py ase numpy; maturin develop --features python,chemfiles
